blockers.explanation: done() callbacks are deprecated in favor of async/await. Must be modernized before migration.
Custom matchers are framework-specific and must be rewritten for the target framework.
blockers.remediation: Document custom matchers and create equivalent implementations for the target framework.

explanation: Source framework: jest. Suggested target: vitest. 2 migration blocker(s) found. Difficulty: medium. 3 standard pattern(s) detected that should migrate cleanly.
limitations: Preview is based on structural pattern analysis, not full AST parsing.
Custom build configurations and plugins are not assessed.
Runtime behavior differences between frameworks are not evaluated.
